rows.label: tev015401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Isobe about Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Isobe if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Isobe about the device Lin is working on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Isobe about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Isobe about the Doll flight module.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Isobe about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0001
rows.name:
I know Lin looks demure, but she's stubborn
as an ox. Once she decides on a course of
action, she won't let anything get in her way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0002
rows.name:
Right now, she's apparently
working on some contraption
that's supposed to let Dolls fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0003
rows.name:
The more levelheaded mechanics keep telling
her to give it up, but it doesn't look
like she intends to take their advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0004
rows.name:
On the contrary, she's in talks
with Commander Vandham about
increasing her development budget.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0005
rows.name:
I'd put the odds of failure at
around 99 percent for your normal,
run-of-the-mill mechanic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0006
rows.name:
But given how stubborn Lin is, we
may well see massive Dolls doing
loop-the-loops over NLA one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0010
rows.name:
We need to develop equipment that is
capable of resisting the strange energy
attacks used by Miran indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0011
rows.name:
But with the technologies that are
currently available to Sakuraba
Industries, that won't be an easy task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0012
rows.name:
No matter how thick we layer the armor, that energy
can blast right through it and harm the wearer.
It's like the laws of physics don't even apply![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0013
rows.name:
We're grateful that you choose Sakuraba products, so
it shames me to have to say this, but please be careful
around indigens that use those energy attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0014
rows.name:
You'd be shocked at how ineffective
your current armor is against them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0019
rows.name:
She's developing a device that will somehow
give the power of flight to Dolls that
were designed for terrestrial combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0020
rows.name:
Her actual development work has made
some good progress, but the field
tests are apparently not going well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0021
rows.name:
Earlier, the test Doll lost control
and nearly crashed into the city!
That, er, caused quite the fuss...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0022
rows.name:
It's not looking like the device
is going to be easy to complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0023
rows.name:
But Lin's passion for the project remains
unabated, and that has me convinced that
she'll see it through somehow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0028
rows.name:
Ma-non technology is
absolutely unbelievable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0029
rows.name:
You know the armor that we've been working on—
with no success, I might add—to resist the strange
energy attacks used by some Miran indigens?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0030
rows.name:
Well, the Ma-non banged it out like it was
nothing! I really want to ask Candid & Credible's
head technologist, Jajanni, how it works.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_0031
rows.name:
But as friendly as the Ma-non are,
I bet even they wouldn't share
trade secrets with a competitor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1001
rows.name:
I was first shown the schematics
for a prototype of the Doll
flight module years ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1002
rows.name:
And do you know who it was that
approached me about it? Lin's parents![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1003
rows.name:
They began development on it way back
then, fully aware that it would take
a great deal of time to complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1004
rows.name:
Who'd have believed that their daughter would
be the one to improve on their design and
ultimately complete the project after their deaths?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1005
rows.name:
How happy they must be, wherever
they are now, to see their daughter
bring their vision to life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1010
rows.name:
Thanks to our joint development of the Doll flight
module with Jajanni's team, Sakuraba Industries
and Candid & Credible are closer than ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1011
rows.name:
We're now having much deeper
discussions with them than
we'd ever thought possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1012
rows.name:
Jajanni has even been participating in
technology- exchange conferences, where he's
been discussing all sorts of things with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1013
rows.name:
It's just one new discovery after
another for us now. Hard to believe
I'm still learning new things at my age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015401_1014
rows.name:
We have to start making even better weapons,
so as not to waste the goodwill with the
Ma-non that Lin has created for us.[ST:wait ]
